title: From #general
headline: A personal ask from Kasia 41% of you have already responded to the Monthly Devel...
quote: A personal ask from Kasia 41% of you have already responded to the Monthly Development Pulse — thank you, genuinely But I need to be honest: I need 70% to make this signal meaningful. Below that, the data doesn't tell me anything useful about what's actually happening with development conversations
author: Katarzyna Raniszewska
